content: My dad—Baba—keeps forgetting to turn the stove off. I put post-its everywhere. I'm also forgetting things. I worked nights all week and I blanked on his meds this morning.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
I'm on nights again next week. I'm scared I'll miss something critical. I already forgot to water his tomatoes for two days and he was so upset.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
Also, he asked me to promise no nursing home. I said yes. I don't know if I can keep that if he worsens.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
Hi again. I'm back. We haven't talked in a while. Baba wandered outside last night. Police brought him back. I'm mortified and exhausted.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
I put in door chimes. But I'm still on nights. My brain is soup. I forgot my own lunch twice this week.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
Doctors keep asking me dates—last fall risk assessment, last med change. I freeze. I know we talked about organizing but I fell off.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
I keep thinking about that promise. If he wanders again, I might have to consider memory care. I hate myself for that.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
I moved Baba to adult day program 3 days a week. I brought his tomato plant so he'd have something familiar. He still asks to go home. I feel like I failed that promise.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
I also forgot to refill his meds last week. Caught it at the last pill. I feel so irresponsible.
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
If he declines more, I might need memory care. How do I keep him from feeling abandoned?
[ERROR: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u201c' in position 7: ordinal not in range(256)]
